clv_history_blocker.reason: BLOCKED: durable PM/odds price history for advancement markets is stale/missing and no CLV stamping / price capture exists for them (no fixed close; convergence metrics still COLLECTING). Live-money gate: a market without price capture + CLV stamping does not get real money — ANY real-money upgrade first needs price/CLV capture restored. This desk is SHADOW-ONLY until that plumbing ships.

caveats: SHADOW-ONLY: decision-support feed; no verdict here is a trade instruction and nothing is wired to execution.
Settlement bases must never be confused: PM advancement includes extra time + penalties; 1X2 settles at 90 minutes. Every embedded 90-minute number in this feed is tagged 1X2_90min.

BLOCKED: durable PM/odds price history for advancement markets is stale/missing and no CLV stamping / price capture exists for them (no fixed close; convergence metrics still COLLECTING). Live-money gate: a market without price capture + CLV stamping does not get real money — ANY real-money upgrade first needs price/CLV capture restored. This desk is SHADOW-ONLY until that plumbing ships.

Taker-side data only: data-api /trades names the taker wallet on each fill; maker identities (resting orders, market makers) are never seen, so buy_pressure and all wallet stats describe aggressive flow only.

The trades API hard-caps history at 3,000 rows offset per market; 361 markets hit that cap (listed in window.truncated_markets) and only carry a deep-history sweep of LARGE trades beyond it — so small-trade stats there are incomplete AND per-wallet PnL/ROI/win-rate can be missing legs entirely for wallets active in those markets. Leaderboard rows carry partial_history=true when affected; 0 wallets have had their complete history re-swept via the per-user endpoint and are exempt.
Open-position marks are LAST-TRADE prints, not order-book mids — thin tokens can carry stale or manipulated marks into mtm_pnl and ROI.
Jump detection is purely price-move based and is NOT attributed to specific match events (no goal-timestamp feed integrated); some 'jumps' are liquidity gaps rather than news.
Smart/dumb cohorts are in-sample, WC-only performance ranks on small per-wallet samples with survivorship effects — treat as descriptive, not as a copy-trade signal.
orderflow history truncated for n=361 markets (data-api 3k-row cap) — flow aggregates there are incomplete; buy-pressure/share numbers are context only
freshness gate FAILED for site/advancement_data.json — stale: 6.4h old > 3.0h max

edge_gate.source: imported from scripts/wca_betrecs.py MIN_EDGE (current live actionable threshold)

orderflow_hot.method: hot = category buy_pressure >= cross-category mean + 1 sample sd within this orderflow feed (taker flow is structurally buy-heavy, so an absolute threshold over-tags)

meta.ordering: bucket on the MODEL prob that the position pays out (moneyline>=50c, mid 25-50c, longshot <25c) primary; further-out stage first secondary (win > Final > SF > QF > R16 > R32 > group_winner); fee-adjusted edge desc as tiebreak only. Decided legs then withheld near-misses rank after the actionable tier. Render in feed order — do not re-sort.

selection_rule.source: imported from wca.selection (src/wca/selection.py — canonical selection rule, human-approved-change file)

meta.settlement_basis: PM advancement includes ET+pens; 1X2 is 90 minutes only

verdict_legend.DO_NOT_TRADE: negative/no model edge or a hard gate failed
verdict_legend.SHADOW_ADD: all data gates pass in a cash-eligible bucket — SHADOW ledger candidate only; the feed-wide clv_history blocker keeps every label non-executing
verdict_legend.WATCH: informative but blocked by a soft gate (projected tie, longshot_no_cash, hot-flow-without-edge, near-threshold edge, side_attribution_uncertain) — never a trade
verdict_legend.WITHHOLD: carried from bet_recs.withheld or a hard data gap/state mismatch; withheld_reason recorded — never a trade

Live-money gate: a market without price capture + CLV stamping does not get real money — ANY real-money upgrade first needs price/CLV capture restored. This desk is SHADOW-ONLY until that plumbing ships.

honesty_notes: Taker-side data only: data-api /trades names the taker wallet on each fill; maker identities (resting orders, market makers) are never seen, so buy_pressure and all wallet stats describe aggressive flow only.

The trades API hard-caps history at 3,000 rows offset per market; 361 markets hit that cap (listed in window.truncated_markets) and only carry a deep-history sweep of LARGE trades beyond it — so small-trade stats there are incomplete AND per-wallet PnL/ROI/win-rate can be missing legs entirely for wallets active in those markets. Leaderboard rows carry partial_history=true when affected; 0 wallets have had their complete history re-swept via the per-user endpoint and are exempt.
Open-position marks are LAST-TRADE prints, not order-book mids — thin tokens can carry stale or manipulated marks into mtm_pnl and ROI.
Jump detection is purely price-move based and is NOT attributed to specific match events (no goal-timestamp feed integrated); some 'jumps' are liquidity gaps rather than news.
Smart/dumb cohorts are in-sample, WC-only performance ranks on small per-wallet samples with survivorship effects — treat as descriptive, not as a copy-trade signal.
orderflow.no_exact_join: exact-market / per-team wallet signals are NOT provided: orderflow.json aggregates carry no defensible join key — omitted rather than faked
orderflow.note: taker-side flow only; context — NEVER overrides the edge gate
